calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Continued To Nov-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Mills for the Executor of the will.

The Court stated that title should be held by the limited partnership, and that this was probably the intent of the Trustor. Mr. Mills stated that the family members interest was to put everything right, that the estate was under Court supervision, and that they did not oppose the petition. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Bonner.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Continued To Mar-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
